content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.procedural.guard.v1",
  "id": "cli_arg_length_guard",
  "description": "Reduce Windows CLI argument length risk by preferring file-based payloads.",
  "rules": [
    "If an action would pass large JSON or prompts via CLI args, write payload to a temp file and pass the file path instead.",
    "Prefer short flags + file paths over inline strings.",
    "When unsure, default to file-based input to avoid command-line length limits."
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Windows cmd/PowerShell have tighter command length limits than POSIX shells.",
    "Use existing workspace temp paths when available."
  ]
}
